name: public_safety_ransomware_incident_forces_redwood_ind_col
premise: Mutual-aid crews from another county arrived with incompatible radio encryption; command needs a comms decision now. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety ransomware incident forces redwood ind col has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is individual versus collective under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Fatima Santos
agents.identity: I am Fatima Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Zara Haddad
agents.identity: I am Zara Haddad, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of collective.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of individual even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Fatima Santos must choose under individual versus collective. What does Fatima Santos do?
